steps.title: Use years after the start
steps.content: Let $t$ be years after $1995$. The first known value is $t=0$ with population $59$, and the second is $t=20$ with population $217$, measured in thousands.

steps.title: Find the linear rate
steps.content:
The slope is
$$
\frac{217-59}{20-0}=\frac{158}{20}=7.9
$$
So the model is $y=7.9t+59$.

steps.title: Predict for the final year
steps.content: For $2019$, $t=24$: $$ y=7.9(24)+59=248.6 $$ Rounded to the nearest whole number, this is $249$. The answer is 249.
